findings.issue: Uses claude-opus-4-6 model for pitch drafting when claude-haiku is sufficient for structured text generation, wasting ~3x tokens and latency.
findings.suggestion: Change to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 to match the intake endpoint, which already handles similar analysis tasks.
findings.est_impact: Reduces cost and latency on /draft-pitch endpoint by ~70%

findings.issue: File rewrite logic repeated in /update and /draft-pitch endpoints — both rebuild entire OPPS_FILE from opps array.
findings.suggestion: Extract saveOpportunitiesList(opps) helper function and reuse it.
findings.est_impact: Reduces maintenance burden and risk of inconsistent serialization

findings.issue: loadOpportunities() catches all exceptions silently and returns empty array, masking file permission or parse errors.
findings.suggestion: Log parse failures with line numbers so data corruption is detectable.
findings.est_impact: Enables debugging of silent data loss

findings.issue: /scan-context endpoint provides no validation that 'context' is actual text vs. null/undefined, can cause API errors on empty strings.
findings.est_impact: Prevents malformed requests from reaching Claude API
